hero_product_name: the AnyWell YS16-1 PLUS electric wheelchair from the white-background reference photos
campaign_goal: Create high-conversion 15 to 20 second Meta-style vertical ads for the AnyWell YS16-1 PLUS using real-life heavy-set senior lifestyle scenes.
target_audience: Heavy-set or plus-size American seniors age 55+, their spouses, and adult children buying mobility support for loved ones.
core_selling_points:
- now $599, reg. $999
- 500W dual motors for grass and gentle slopes
- 22-inch first-class wide seat
- supports up to 330 lbs
- folds in seconds for the trunk
use_scenarios:
- driveway and porch exit
- grass edge and neighborhood path
- adult child walking beside a parent
visual_style: Realistic, warm, sales-driven, portrait-first American lifestyle advertising with strong product readability.
style_tone: persuasive, warm, confident, practical, never clinical
consistency_anchor: Match the real YS16-1 PLUS wheelchair from the white-background product photos while keeping it only in normal open riding position. Preserve the right-side joystick, wide seat feel, frame, footrest, wheel layout, and real product silhouette. In every shot, keep the rider and wheelchair proportion close to c1 and c2: the rider naturally fills the broad seat, the chair reads substantial and premium, and neither subject looks oversized or undersized relative to the other.
additional_info: Hard Meta ad rules: heavy-set or plus-size American seniors age 55+ only, 15 to 20 seconds total, seamless real-world B-roll only, no white-background cut-ins, and simple safe actions only. Compose each shot with negative space for post-added floating UI copy such as 500W dual motors, 22-inch seat, 330 LBS, $599 sale price, FDA 510(k) Cleared, 14-Day FREE Return Shipping, 30-Day Risk-Free Trial, and PayPal financing starting at $32.27 per month or as low as 0% APR.
music: Bright modern ad underscore with warm piano and subtle pulse.

concepts.title: Gift Of Freedom
concepts.core_theme: An adult daughter sees her heavy-set mom moving comfortably again.
concepts.main_theme: Comfort, power, and emotional relief in one short story.
concepts.hook: Give her the gift of real freedom.
concepts.cover_copy: Give Her The Gift Of Freedom.
concepts.visual_style: Sunlit driveway and yard edge, adult daughter beside her mother, warm Meta ad framing like c1.
concepts.continuity_rider_anchor: Keep the same plus-size American senior mother age 60+ and the same adult daughter across all three shots. The mother should naturally fill the wide seat and look well-supported by the chair, similar to c1.
concepts.use_scenarios:
- driveway slope
- path by the lawn
- smiling sales finish
concepts.additional_info: Use proportion cues from c1: the seated rider should feel comfortably supported, with the chair large and readable in frame.

shots.scene_description: A plus-size American senior woman in her 60s drives the YS16-1 PLUS calmly up a gentle driveway incline while her adult daughter walks beside her, smiling with relief. The frame feels like c1: medium-wide, the mother and chair dominate the portrait frame, the wide seat clearly supports her body, and the wheelchair looks full-sized and premium rather than tiny. Leave clean upper-left negative space for floating UI such as 500W dual motors and $599.
shots.camera_movement: smooth front-side tracking with a slight push-in as they move uphill
shots.lighting: warm late-afternoon daylight with soft highlights on faces and frame edges
shots.composition_and_set_dressing: portrait medium-wide driveway composition, chair and rider large in frame, little empty headroom, no white-background packshot feel
shots.transition_anchor: end with the chair reaching level ground and continuing forward
shots.voiceover_en: Need a wheelchair that actually feels made for a bigger body?
shots.key_message: Power and comfort should feel immediate.
shots.sfx: soft wheel roll, outdoor ambience, gentle footsteps

shots.scene_description: The same mother glides smoothly along the yard path and settles confidently into the broad seat posture, smiling as the daughter keeps pace. Keep the framing close to c1 and c2: the rider visibly fills the 22-inch seat naturally, thighs supported, torso proportionate to the backrest, and the chair remains large and balanced in frame. Leave open space for overlay lines like 22-inch first-class seat, 330 LBS capacity, and folds in seconds for the trunk.
shots.camera_movement: steady joystick-side front-profile move that shows smooth control and natural seated support
shots.lighting: bright clean daylight with premium but realistic contrast
shots.composition_and_set_dressing: portrait medium shot with the rider and chair taking most of the frame height, background soft and real, no awkward empty space
shots.transition_anchor: end with a calm smile and slight look toward the daughter
shots.voiceover_en: The wide 22-inch seat and 500-watt dual motors make hills, grass, and everyday outings feel easy.
shots.key_message: Comfort and power are both visible.
shots.sfx: smooth motor ambience, light breeze, natural yard sound

shots.scene_description: The mother and daughter pause and smile toward camera in a clean lifestyle hero frame. The mother gives a small confident nod while seated naturally in the chair, still framed large like c1 and c2. Keep soft background separation and enough negative space for a semi-transparent end-card overlay with $599 sale price, FDA 510(k) Cleared, 30-Day Risk-Free Trial, 14-Day FREE Return Shipping, and PayPal financing starting at $32.27 per month or as low as 0% APR.
shots.camera_movement: gentle settle into a locked portrait hero frame
shots.lighting: warm flattering light with a polished but realistic sales-ad finish
shots.composition_and_set_dressing: portrait hero composition, rider and chair prominent, open space reserved for trust and pricing graphics
shots.transition_anchor: end on a still frame for the end card
shots.voiceover_en: Now just five ninety-nine, with FDA-cleared safety, free returns, and PayPal financing from thirty-two twenty-seven a month.
shots.key_message: Price, trust, and financing close the sale.
shots.sfx: music lift and soft outdoor ambience

concepts.title: Under 600 And Built For More
concepts.core_theme: A heavy-set older man gets premium comfort and real motor support at a shockingly low price.
concepts.hook: A real power chair under 600 bucks?
concepts.cta: Get the YS16-1 PLUS while the sale lasts.
concepts.visual_style: Tree-lined neighborhood path, heavy-set senior man, confident solo driving, c2-style scale and sales energy.
concepts.continuity_rider_anchor: Keep the same plus-size American senior man age 60+ across all three shots. Use c2-like proportion and framing: the man looks substantial, the chair feels full-size and supportive, and the seat looks wide and secure.
concepts.use_scenarios:
- neighborhood path
- grass edge
- thumbs-up close
concepts.additional_info: Use c2 as the main proportion reference: clear product visibility, strong seat scale, and a natural heavy-set rider-chair balance.

shots.scene_description: A plus-size American senior man in his 60s drives the YS16-1 PLUS confidently along a sunny neighborhood path, looking relaxed and capable. Match c2 proportion cues: medium-wide framing, the chair large and readable, the rider filling the seat naturally, and no toy-size look. Leave upper-right or upper-left negative space for overlay text like Premium Wheelchair Under $600 and $599 sale price.
shots.camera_movement: smooth front-side travel shot that keeps the rider and chair centered and strong
shots.lighting: bright green-park daylight with crisp but believable highlights
shots.composition_and_set_dressing: portrait medium-wide frame, clear product silhouette, rider and chair occupy most of the vertical frame
shots.transition_anchor: end with the rider turning slightly toward camera
shots.voiceover_en: A real power chair under six hundred bucks? Yes, really.
shots.sfx: light wheel roll and neighborhood ambience

shots.scene_description: The same man glides past a grass edge and settles deeper into the seat with a relaxed smile, showing stable posture and easy control. Keep the seat visibly broad and supportive like c2, with the rider's fuller torso and legs proportionate to the chair. Avoid empty space and make the wheelchair feel substantial. Reserve clean space for overlays: First-Class 22-inch Seat, 500W Dual Motors, and Supports Up To 330 LBS.
shots.camera_movement: steady front-quarter move with a slight push-in on the seated comfort moment
shots.lighting: warm sun with soft background falloff and strong product readability
shots.composition_and_set_dressing: portrait medium shot, rider and chair dominate the frame, simple park background, no visual clutter
shots.transition_anchor: end on a confident smile and visible joystick hand
shots.voiceover_en: From the wide first-class seat to the powerful dual motors, this chair is built to feel stable, smooth, and supportive.
shots.key_message: The core specs are emotionally believable on screen.
shots.sfx: subtle motor hum and soft wind in trees

shots.scene_description: The same man stops, smiles at camera, and gives a simple thumbs-up from the chair. Keep the framing close to c2: his upper body and the chair fill the portrait frame, still reading natural and premium, with room for a bold trust and finance end card. Overlay area should support Now $599 Reg $999, FDA 510(k) Cleared, 14-Day FREE Return Shipping, 30-Day Risk-Free Trial, and PayPal financing from $32.27 per month or as low as 0% APR.
shots.camera_movement: gentle settle into a close portrait sales frame
shots.lighting: warm golden sales light with soft background blur
shots.composition_and_set_dressing: portrait close-medium frame, big friendly expression, chair still readable, empty space reserved for offer stack
shots.transition_anchor: final hold for logo and CTA
shots.voiceover_en: Grab the AnyWell sale now and get risk-free returns, FDA-cleared safety, and easy PayPal financing.
shots.key_message: The final shot closes with urgency and trust.

concepts.title: She Can Go With Dad Again
concepts.core_theme: An adult daughter gets her father back outdoors without stress.
concepts.hook: She can walk with Dad again.
concepts.visual_style: Warm suburban path, adult daughter and heavy-set father, trust-driven family Meta ad.
concepts.continuity_rider_anchor: Keep the same plus-size American senior father age 60+ and the same adult daughter across all three shots. Use c1 and c2 scale logic so the father looks securely supported and the chair reads premium and full-size.
concepts.use_scenarios:
- porch to sidewalk
- side-by-side path walk
- family trust finish
concepts.additional_info: This concept should lean hardest into filial warmth while still selling price, comfort, power, and trust.

shots.scene_description: A plus-size American senior father drives out from the porch toward the sidewalk while his adult daughter walks beside him with a relieved smile. Use c1 and c2 proportions: broad supportive seat, natural heavy-set posture, the chair large and stable in frame, and the father visibly comfortable rather than squeezed or towering over the backrest. Leave clean top-corner space for hook overlays like 500W Dual Motors and 330 LBS Capacity.
shots.camera_movement: smooth front-side follow move from porch to sidewalk
shots.lighting: soft bright daylight with warm family-ad tones
shots.composition_and_set_dressing: portrait medium-wide family frame, rider and chair prominent, daughter visible but secondary, little empty headroom
shots.transition_anchor: end with both moving forward at the same pace
shots.voiceover_en: When the chair feels stable and comfortable, family walks come back.
shots.sfx: wheel roll, light footsteps, outdoor ambience

shots.scene_description: The father continues along a smooth path with his right hand on the joystick while the daughter matches pace and smiles. Keep the rider-chair ratio believable like c1 and c2: fuller body naturally seated in the wide chair, strong wheel size, readable frame, and no toy-like scale. Leave space for UI overlays calling out 22-inch first-class seat, 500W dual motors, and folds in seconds for the trunk.
shots.camera_movement: steady joystick-side front-profile move with soft parallax from homes and trees
shots.lighting: clean daylight with soft skin tones and good product separation
shots.composition_and_set_dressing: portrait medium shot, chair and rider take most of the frame, family environment remains real and uncluttered
shots.transition_anchor: end with the daughter glancing over and the father smiling back
shots.voiceover_en: The wide seat feels secure, the ride feels smooth, and it even folds fast for the trunk.
shots.sfx: soft motor ambience, suburban birds, gentle breeze

shots.scene_description: Father and daughter stop and smile in a clean portrait hero frame built for a sales overlay. Keep the father seated naturally and proportionately in the chair with strong c1/c2 scale cues, and reserve negative space for the final stack: Now $599 Reg $999, FDA 510(k) Cleared, 30-Day Risk-Free Trial, 14-Day FREE Return Shipping, and PayPal financing from $32.27 per month or as low as 0% APR.
shots.camera_movement: slow settle into a warm close hero frame
shots.lighting: golden practical light with a polished direct-response finish
shots.composition_and_set_dressing: portrait close-medium family frame, smile-driven close, chair still readable, clean open space for the offer stack
shots.voiceover_en: Now just five ninety-nine, with FDA-cleared safety, free returns, and easy financing for families who need help now.
shots.key_message: The final beat combines urgency, trust, and family appeal.
shots.sfx: music rise and gentle outdoor ambience
